Patch Set 2:

What needs to be done to get this landed?

Patch Set 2:

James, From the comments, it looks like we need to add a check in the new replay-single test 93 and only run the test for servers that have this patch (the one we are trying to land). 

Unfortunately, the server versions that include this patch will be >= 2.5.4 and >= 2.6.90. So, something like:
 [[ $server_version -lt $(version_code 2.5.4) ]] ||
        [[ $server_version -gt $(version_code 2.5.50) &&
          $server_version -lt $(version_code 2.6.90) ]] ||
        { skip "Need MDS version at least 2.5.4 or 2.6.90, b2_6"; return; }


(Would Yu,Jian or Bob please check this?)

Patch Set 2:

Currently, the patch also does not exist in 2.5.11+. In addition, since 2.5.4 has not been tagged, in order to make the test run on the current b2_5 branch (still 2.5.3), the check has to be made as follows:

        local server_version=$(lustre_version_code $SINGLEMDS)

        [[ $server_version -ge $(version_code 2.6.90) ]] ||
        [[ $server_version -ge $(version_code 2.5.3) &&
           $server_version -lt $(version_code 2.5.11) ]] ||
                { skip "Need MDS version 2.5.4+ or 2.6.90+"; return; }

parents.subject: LU-5830 scripts: use lustre_rmmod in lnet start/stop script

commit.subject: LU-5651: ptlrpc: fix import state during replay
commit.message:
LU-5651: ptlrpc: fix import state during replay

Client doesn't restore import state correctly
on reconnect during replay. It resends lock replay
when final ping was queued by server.
Server fails with "target_queue_recovery_request())
ASSERTION( req->rq_export->exp_lock_replay_needed ) failed"

Add imp_replay_state to store last replay state.
imp_state is restored from imp_replay_state
during reconnect.

Lustre-commit: f61cec84e61e4be07ab741dd0fbeac3b4a388eef
Lustre-change: http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/12015

The new test for replay-single will only work for lustre
versions that contain commit f61cec84. This patch does
lustre version checking to over failing on platforms that
are not fixed.

Lustre-commit: afde9f17260650d0cb80d53613fb5afda0a39384
Lustre-change: http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/12942

Xyratex-bug-id: MRP-2022
